markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to align on SEO strategy, content audit progress, and collaboration between GrowthX and Diligent teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is conducting a site audit to identify content pruning/refresh opportunities and develop an editorial strategy for increasing qualified organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Diligent wants to focus on non-brand keyword rankings, especially for product/solution pages, and improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Multiple teams (SEO, content, PR, research) contribute to Diligent's content; better alignment and a unified content calendar are needed](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [GrowthX will incorporate Diligent's internal expertise and data into content creation to strengthen EEAT signals](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Focus and Challenges

  - [Expanding beyond governance to other key solution areas (e.g., audit, risk, compliance)](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Updating legacy content with more product depth and EAT factors](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Competitive plays to overtake rivals in specific areas (e.g., 3000+ search terms for governance)](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Challenge: balancing quality and scale with limited resources](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Content Strategy and LLM Optimization

  - [Focus on low-volume, bottom-of-funnel content more likely to be referenced by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Emphasis on readability, clear organization, and unique insights](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Success seen with zero-volume searches on emerging topics (e.g., AI in dental industry)](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Diligent's brand authority gives them an advantage in LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Content Management and Collaboration

  - [Multiple teams contributing content: SEO, content marketing, Diligent Institute, PR](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Need for a unified content calendar and better alignment between teams](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Weekly publish update spreadsheet available for historical content changes](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [GrowthX to create custom artifacts (e.g., information gain doc) to incorporate Diligent's internal expertise](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

### Site Audit and Content Pruning

  - [GrowthX identified over 1000 pages for review](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
  - [Analyzing keyword data from SEMrush and GSC to determine content value](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
  - [Will consider historical performance before recommending content removal](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Diligent to share existing documentation on content clustering and pruning efforts](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)

### Priority Areas and Industries

  - [Boards and governance solution identified as the top priority for content](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2464.0)
  - [Need for more insights into target industries for broader content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide content pruning/refresh recommendations by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Diligent to share internal documentation on content clustering and pruning](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
  - [GrowthX to interview Eleni for more product insights](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [Add Jordan, Amanda, and John to future weekly calls for better alignment](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with a Slack message recapping next steps](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
  - [Add Festus to Notion doc and GrowthX systems for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/wUrW_fEnx8pF4M_ykA6NGbZA3xx4bu8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2675.0)
